diningSection.title: Culinary Excellence
diningSection.description: From hearty breakfasts to elegant dinners, our menu features locally-sourced ingredients and international flavors. Experience culinary artistry at every meal.

spaSection.title: Spa & Wellness
spaSection.description: Our world-class spa offers a range of treatments designed to help you unwind and refresh. From massages to manicures, we have everything you need for the ultimate relaxation experience.

testimonialsSection.title: Guest Testimonials
testimonialsSection.subtitle: Hear from our guests about their unforgettable experiences.
testimonialsSection.description: What our guests say about their experience

reviews.name: Sarah Mitchell
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning hotel! The service was impeccable and the rooms were beautifully designed. The spa treatments were divine.

reviews.name: James Peterson
reviews.comment: Best hotel experience in South Africa. The staff went above and beyond to make our stay memorable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Emma van der Berg
reviews.comment: A hidden gem! Every detail was perfect. The breakfast was exceptional and the amenities are world-class.

reviews.name: Michael Chen
reviews.comment: Exceptional hospitality and attention to detail. The views are absolutely breathtaking and the staff is incredibly courteous.

reviews.name: Isabella Rodriguez
reviews.comment: A luxury experience like no other! The rooms are elegantly furnished and the dining experience is unforgettable.

reviews.name: David Thompson
reviews.comment: Truly world-class! Every moment at this hotel was special. Can't wait to return for another amazing stay.
